criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores like Google Play and Apple App Store.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's core features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and breadth of the educational content provided by the app.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, user feedback, educational blogs

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, navigation, and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, design awards, tech reviews

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and functionality across different platforms and devices.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique features and innovative approaches to education.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app reviews, developer updates

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Level of user engagement and retention rates.

criteria.name: Security and Privacy
criteria.description: Measures taken to ensure user data security and privacy.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user reviews

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.
criteria.sources: User reviews, support forums, developer websites
